replies.msg:
1st hon只係基本條件，從來都唔係必收條件
成績再高推薦再多，interview 1999又講唔到自己有幾誠懇，梗係得個桔

HKU Biomed 1st hon 讀完再駁MBBS，一年都幾個，info day biomed school仲要攞呢個做賣點招生，HKU Pharm呢兩年都有
ibanker/牙醫攞CV報non-JUPAS入咗又有
CUHK Pharm/Nurs/Bio related仲年年有人trans到，直情唔使finish 1st degree

當然呢班人本身係大學幾年都係出類拔萃，意志好堅定，而且通常係醫生圈子度有connection
仲猶猶豫豫係連登出post求安慰個d 恐怕都無機啦
唔好眼高手低連自己宜家讀緊ge degree都讀爛埋

人地個重點係講緊就算FIRST HON,有埋大粒佬寫Reference都入唔到,second degree都唔洗旨意入,你就假設人地interview點柒 事實上科科拎A,FIRST HON係好撚難,樓上咪撚博,仲要過interview比人chok 睇你唔順眼直接fail你

replies.msg:
點會唔使旨意，你識好多healthcare student 2nd degree係難但唔係impossible，只係你朋友衰咗啫 雖然我都唔支持樓主搏

呢幾年已經比以前多好多位，CU Medic 要谷DSE分，宜家一年first year 235個位得一半係經JUPAS入，仲要收一堆second year entry，搞到有幾年yr2超過250人，自己數下幾多人啦

俾人chok就你trans咩科都會架啦，學生人頭郁咗，學系搞UGC subsidy會好麻煩

唔止要追兩分喔樓主，你要考慮埋penalty 個問題，唔係個個都可以再考爆分，唔係睇死樓主，但係一年可以爆好多分既retaker 本來就唔多，你呢個分再爆高個機會率真係好低。心態同考試當日狀態足以決定你最尾個分數。
利申 夠分讀理大三寶再考DSE 被收皮，問過MBBS 教授retaker 入mbbs 有幾多例子, 佢答DSE 以黎係個位數字case

識讀一定讀medic，如果成績、時機唔就，都唔會揀三寶，三寶唔值咁高分嘅人入，出黎造野就識後悔（完全冇clinical autonomy），醫生唔畀referral你，你就乞食！（讀黎移民除外，反勝medic）！

畀我quitU，一定揀ClinPsy！點解？自己搵！

replies.msg:
The extended mathematics module contributes to the total HKDSE score if
its attained level is higher than that of the worst one of the seven subjects (4 core
subjects + the best 3 elective subjects). In that case, the score for the worst subject
is replaced by a new score comprising half the original score for that subject and
half the score of the extended mathematics module (e.g. the worst subject is Grade
6
5 and the extended mathematics is Grade 5*, then the new score for that subject
is (5+6)/2 = 5.5).


Students that only have 2 electives and an extended mathematics module
can count half the extended mathematics module score in the total score. This is a
result of the missing 3rd elective being scored as 0, and the extended mathematics
weighting described above.

half the score of the extended mathematics module (e.g. the worst subject is Grade

Students that only have 2 electives and an extended mathematics module
can count half the extended mathematics module score in the total score. This is a
result of the missing 3rd elective being scored as 0, and the extended mathematics
weighting described above.
佢讀phy chem bio m2

The extended mathematics module contributes to the total HKDSE score if
its attained level is higher than that of the worst one of the seven subjects (4 core
subjects + the best 3 elective subjects). In that case, the score for the worst subject
is replaced by a new score comprising half the original score for that subject and
half the score of the extended mathematics module (e.g. the worst subject is Grade
6
5 and the extended mathematics is Grade 5*, then the new score for that subject
is (5+6)/2 = 5.5).


Students that only have 2 electives and an extended mathematics module
can count half the extended mathematics module score in the total score. This is a
result of the missing 3rd elective being scored as 0, and the extended mathematics
weighting described above.
